privileged_info_summary: The task requires fixing bugs in a synthetic implementation of the Raft consensus algorithm. The code is generated in '/home/ga/PycharmProjects/raft_kv'. The verification script requires a minimum score of 60 to pass. The task accurately represents work done by distributed systems engineers in the cloud computing and infrastructure industry.
